Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process 1 Start Verify Service Request SR Activity 2 After SR Contract Setup CS Activity dependent on SR 3 After CS Two parallel tasks Datacenter Allocation DA and Access Control Initialization ACI They are concurrent no order between them Both must be completed before next step So partial order with nodes DA ACI and no edges 4 After both DA and ACI completed looped configuration phase Base Network Configuration BNC then optionally Debug Reconfigure DR repeatedly until stable This is a loop execute A BNC then either exit or execute B DR and then A again So loop structure BNC DR where A BNC B DR 5 After loop ends exclusive choice Containerized Deployment CD or Monolithic Deployment MD So X CD MD 6 After deployment QA and SA in parallel both must be done no order So partial order with nodes QA SA and no edges 7 After QA and SA completed Go Live Approval GLA So GLA depends on both QA and SA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to combine these The process is partially ordered overall The dependencies SR to CS CS to DA and ACI that is CS proceeds to the parallel block DA and ACI to loop both must finish before loop starts loop to XOR XOR to parallel QA SA XOR precedes the QA SA block QA and SA to GLA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can model the entire process as a StrictPartialOrder that contains these sub models as nodes with edges representing the dependencies The sub models are SR CS a partial order for DA ACI call it po da aci the loop node the XOR node a partial order for QA SA po qa sa and GLA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we add edges SR to CS CS to po da aci po da aci to loop loop to XOR XOR to po qa sa po qa sa to GLA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Alternatively we could embed the partial orders directly as nodes But note that in POWL a StrictPartialOrder is a POWL model with nodes and order So we can have a top level StrictPartialOrder whose nodes are other POWL models including other StrictPartialOrder instances So we can construct partial orders for DA ACI and QA SA

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets define nodes SR Transition label SR CS Transition label CS DA Transition label DA ACI Transition label ACI po da aci StrictPartialOrder nodes DA ACI BNC Transition label BNC DNR Transition label DR loop OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children BNC DNR CD Transition label CD MD Transition label MD xor OperatorPOWL operator Operator XOR children CD MD QA Transition label QA SA Transition label SA po qa sa StrictPartialOrder nodes QA SA GLA Transition label GLA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now top level partial order nodes SR CS po da aci loop xor po qa sa GLA Well add edges SR to CS CS to po da aci since po da aci is the whole parallel block after CS we can start both DA and ACI they both need to finish before proceeding The edge from CS to po da aci indicates that the whole block cannot start before CS completes Then within po da aci no order Then after po da aci we go to loop We need an edge from po da aci to loop Since po da aci is a StrictPartialOrder the target is that model So po da aci to loop loop to xor xor to po qa sa po qa sa to GLA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All dependencies are straightforward Make sure loop is a loop of BNC and DR The loop semantics execute BNC then either exit or execute DR and then BNC again That matches BNC DR No need for silent transitions unless to represent exit No the loop operator handles exit

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also the scenario says If stable the loop ends Thats inherent after BNC the loop decides to exit or continue The exit condition is modeled by the loop structure itself after A BNC there is a choice between finishing or doing B DR then A again So no silent needed
